title: ForensicEvent
description: The canonical event a Babel parser yields. Required: timestamp + message. Structured artifact types must carry their raw record. Rosetta maps this to full ECS v8 + OSSEM (see ecs_extension.md).

artifact_type.description: Routing key from the ~90-entry artifact-type taxonomy (e.g. windows_event, prefetch, syslog, docker_event).

raw.description: Original parsed record. REQUIRED for structured artifact types; preserves fidelity for re-mapping.

os.description: OS classification of the source artifact.

source_path.description: Path/name of the artifact this event was parsed from.

parser.description: Babel parser id that produced this event.
